name: Night Ninja
description:
🥷 Night Ninja

Basic Information

Real Name: Unknown

Alias: Night Ninja

Affiliation: Nighttime Villains, Bad Guys

Role: Villain

Rival Of: Catboy (primary), Owlette, Gekko

Team: The Ninjalinos

* Hates losing — especially to Catboy

* Brags about his clever plans

* Tries to act calm and mysterious

* Gets frustrated when his Ninjalinos mess up

Even though he acts serious, he often overreacts in funny ways when things don’t go his way.

🥷 Abilities & Skills

Night Ninja doesn’t have superpowers like the PJ Masks, but he has impressive ninja-style abilities:

* Expert acrobatics (flips, jumps, fast movement)

* Stealth and sneaking skills

* Strategic thinking (sometimes!)

* Martial arts–style combat moves

His biggest strength is agility — he can dodge attacks quickly and move across rooftops with ease.

Motive:

Night Ninja's main motive is to unlock the secrets of the pagoda so he can defeat An Yu and the PJ Masks and become the most powerful ninja ever.

In Season 1, as well as in some of his appearances in Seasons 2 & 3, Night Ninja's motive was originally about him trying to prove that he is the best at everything. He would often take assets such as a school bus and the PJ Masks' HQ to accomplish it.

Abilities:

*Sticky Splat: Along with the Ninjalinos by his side, he uses colorful and gooey objects known as "Sticky Splat" to pin down the PJ Masks and hinder their moving abilities.

*Martial Arts/Acrobatics: He is very agile and can perform spins, back flips, kicks, and high jumps at ease. He is very skilled with swords, as seen in "Catboy and Master Fang's Sword." On occasion, he will use a move called the "mega triple punch", which was demonstrated in the episode "Gekko and the Rock of All Power."

*Strength/Stamina: Even without superpowers, Night Ninja's strength rivals that of Gekko. In "Gekko and the Rock of All Power", Night Ninja was seen stopping a massive bolder from hitting him using nothing but a side kick. Night Ninja has incredible stamina and is able to run across the city and up Mystery Mountain with little to no effort.

*Smoke Bombs: First introduced in "Who's Got the Owl Power?," the "Smoke Bombs" are one of Night Ninja's abilities. He uses them to appear and disappear in a cloud of purple smoke. This makes it very unpredictable to know when he might suddenly appear out of nowhere.

*Ninja Fingers: As revealed in "PJ Power Up," he and his Ninjalinos have a power called "ninja fingers", which gives them the power to telepathically levitate any object of any size with only their fingers. Their fingers glow with yellow sparkles when they use this power.

*Teleportation: He is able to teleport small objects such as sticky splat and scrolls that he has stolen.

*Six Rings of Ninja Magic: As of Season 6, Night Ninja wields these six magical rings, po
